journey.name: Long-press Uninstall and Cancel paths
journey.description: Uninstall opens the system confirmation dialog (never a launcher-drawn one); cancelling it returns to an unchanged grid. The menu's Cancel button and the Back key both dismiss the menu and return focus to the pressed tile.

actions.action: Launch the Nocturne launcher (com.pavlovsfrog.minimaltvlauncher) and verify the app grid is shown with at least one user-installed (uninstallable) app tile.
Move focus to a user-installed app tile and long-press OK on it. Verify the action row appears.
Move focus right to Uninstall and press OK.
Verify a system uninstall confirmation dialog is shown (drawn by the OS package installer, not by the launcher — the launcher's own UI must not contain the dialog).
Verify the launcher is back in the foreground and the app tile is still present on the grid, unchanged.
Long-press OK on the same tile again, move focus to Cancel, and press OK.
Verify the menu closes with no change to the grid and focus is back on the pressed tile.
Long-press OK on the same tile once more, then press Back.
Verify the menu closes with no change to the grid and focus is back on the pressed tile.
